knowledge_gaps: CLO OC test mechanics at the 7.5% CCC-bucket threshold create non-linear systemic stress amplification with step-function market disruption
Private credit's rate-insensitive deployment creates a structural leak in monetary transmission with 5-15bp neutral rate impact
Structural vs cyclical inflation decomposition methodology
PE-backed services sector consolidation creates a feedback loop sustaining services inflation through oligopolistic pricing power in healthcare, insurance, and business services
AI-driven productivity impact on services inflation

Expectations drift (sub-threshold gradual ratchet of 25-50bp) is a more relevant risk than formal de-anchoring, operating through firm pricing behavior and consumer acceptance below the Coibion-Gorodnichenko threshold
BoJ normalization is an underpriced exogenous shock producing 15-30bp term premium impact through repatriation of ~$1.6T in foreign holdings
